titleStmt.title: SII 22.427: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 427. (A.R. No. 427 of 1906) TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, MĀṈŪR. AMBALAVĀṆASVĀMI TEMPLE—ON A PILLAR SET UP IN FRONT

summary.p: The inscription is built in at its lower end by the platform on which it stands. It mentions the trading community called the Diśai Āyirattaññūṟṟuvar who claim themselves to be the children (devotees) of goddess Paramēśvari of Aiyapoḻil-pura and whose members had business interest in a number of places. A list of them is given below. 1. Tirukkōḷūr alias Lōkachintāmaṇipuram in Tiruvaḻudivaḷanāḍu 2. Kaṇṇaṉūr alias Karikālaśoḻapuram 3. Paṭṭaṇamarudūr alias Kēraḷāntakapuram 4. Mānavīrapaṭṭaṇam alias Dēśi Uttamachōḷapaṭṭaṇam 5. Vīrapāṇḍyapuram alias Dēśi Ayyapaṭṭaṇam 6. Veḷḷūr alias Rājarājapuram 7. Pūvēndiyaśōḻapuram in Aḻagiyaśēkhara-vaḷanāḍu 8. Śivacharaṇaśēkhara-perunderuvu in Kīḻvēmbu-nāḍu 9. Dēśi Uyyavandapaṭṭaṇam and 10. Rājavallapuram.
The purpose of the record is however not known, being lost in the built in portion.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Ārogyamastu .
samastabhuvanāśraya pa
ñcaśataviraśāsana A
negaguṇa gaṇaālaya lakṣa
ṇa lamilaṅkṛtavakṣastama
labhuvanaparākrama śrīvāsude
vakaṇṭabi (?) mūlapatrot
bhava śrī Aiyyapobit
puraparameśvarikku makka
ḷāki nikaḷāniṉṟa tiruvaḻutivaḷa
nāṭṭut tirukkoḷūrāṉa O
lokacintāmaṇipurattut
ticai Āirattu Aññūṟ
ṟuvarum kaṇṇaṉūrāṉa karikā
lacoḻapurattut ticai Āi
rattu Aññūṟṟuvarum paṭṭa
ṇamarutūrāṉa keraḷāntakapura
ttut ticai Āirattu Aññūṟṟu
varum māṉavirapaṭṭaṇamāṉa
teci Uttamacoḷapaṭṭaṇattu
tticai Āirattaññūṟṟuvaru
m virapāṇṭiyapuramāṉa te
ci Ayyapaṭṭaṇattut ticaiā
irattaññūṟṟuvarum veḷḷūrā
ṉa rājarājapurattut ticaiāyirat
taññūṟṟuvarum Aḻakiya cekara
vaḷanāṭṭup puven=tiyacoḻapu
rattut ticaiāyirattaññūṟṟu
varum kiḷvempanāṭṭuc civaca
raṇacekarapperun=teruvil ticai
Āyirattaññūṟṟuvarum tirukkā
makkoṭṭam perun=teruvāṉanūṟu
nūṟāyiratecampit teci Uyyava
ntapaṭṭaṇattut ticaiyāyirat
taññūṟṟuvarum Irājavalla
ppuramāṉa coṟuṭaiyatiṇṇaBuilt in below.
Digital edition of SII 22.427 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
